summary: Create or update PhoneBio Field Biology Worker assistant using vapi/assistant.field-biology-worker.json after confirming Vapi API key and target phone number.
Publish clean PhoneBio repo after local verification and secret scan.
Create protocol/safety/hardware schema only if hackathon backend persistence is required.

Optional provider setup now exists behind NEBIUS_API_KEY and LLM_PROVIDER_ORDER=nebius,local. Run make nebius-probe after hackathon/free credits are active; keep deterministic safety tools on /webhook.
Use docs/PROVIDER_STRATEGY.md to route Vapi credits to calls, InsForge to deterministic hosted tools, Nebius free credits to non-safety model experiments, and Ollama to no-cost local fallback.

Live Vapi assistant creation and selected phone-number assignment are verified. Remaining evidence is a real inbound call to the assigned number, or an approved outbound test call after VAPI_TEST_NUMBER is set.
Refresh Ollarma selection and restore Watchtower bridge aggregator before using Ollarma as a strict PhoneBio work lane.
Deploy FastAPI app through Docker/Procfile or Vapi CLI tunnel, then set VAPI_WEBHOOK_URL for live assistant creation.
